risk_title: Security-driven work suspension affecting project implementation
risk_summary: Construction and installation of four substations (Component 1) was halted due to security concerns, directly impacting project progress and timeline.
evidence_quote: The construction and installation of four substations with the total capacity of 40,000kVA under Component 1 was stopped from August 15, 2021 due to the security reason and is expected to be completed within 3 months when the work will be resumed.

risk_title: Political and governance instability affecting project execution
risk_summary: Political and governance risk rating remains 'High' at current assessment, indicating substantial fragility in the operating environment that constrains project implementation.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance [Risk Category Rating] Current Rating: High

risk_title: Suspension of IDA grant disbursements pending World Bank decision
risk_summary: Undisbursed IDA grants remain suspended, indicating broader FCV-related concerns affecting the project's financial execution and implementation capacity.
evidence_quote: Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until further decision is made by the World Bank.
